**Mode:** Geral (full scan)

| Aspecto | Valor |

| Primary Language | TypeScript (100%) |
| Total Source Files | ~730 |
| TS/TSX Files | ~726 |
| JS Files | 0 |
| Testing Framework | Vitest + Playwright (E2E) |
| Test Files | 167 |
| Dependencies | 34 prod + 21 dev |
| Output Mode | Standalone |
| Observability | Sentry |
| State Management | @tanstack/react-query |
| Forms | react-hook-form + zod |
| UI Library | Radix UI + Shadcn/ui |
| CSS | TailwindCSS 4 |
| Rich Text | TipTap |
| Animations | Framer Motion |

## Application Architecture

### Route Groups (App Router)

| Route Group | Proposito | Pages |
|-------------|-----------|-------|
| `(portal)` | Portal da academia (tenant) | ~87 pages |
| `(backoffice)` | Administracao SaaS/multi-tenant | ~30+ pages |
| `(cliente)` | Area do cliente (aluno) | 9 pages |
| `(public)` | Paginas publicas (B2B, adesao) | 3+ pages |
| `(auth)` | Autenticacao (primeiro acesso) | 1 page |
| `app/[networkSubdomain]` | Login/auth por rede | 4 pages |
| `grade/` | Grade horaria (mural/img) | 4 pages |
| `monitor/` | Monitor de boas-vindas (catraca) | 2 pages |
| `status/` | Status page | 1 page |
| `api/` | API Routes (health, whatsapp) | 2 routes |

### Portal (Tenant) - Modulos

| Modulo | Paginas | Dominio |
|--------|---------|---------|
| Dashboard | 1 | Visao geral |
| CRM | 5 | Prospects, campanhas, cadencias, playbooks, tarefas |
| Prospects | 2 | Lista + conversao |
| Alunos/Clientes | 5 | Lista, detalhe, cartoes, v2 |
| Vendas | 2 | Nova venda, lista |
| Matriculas | 1 | Lista |
| Planos | 3 | Lista, novo, editar |
| Pagamentos | 2 | Lista, emissao em lote |
| Grade | 1 | Horarios/aulas |
| Treinos | 5 | Templates, exercicios, grupos musculares, atribuidos |
| Reservas | 1 | Agendamento |
| Atendimento | 3 | Dashboard, inbox, detalhe |
| Administrativo | 29 | Configuracoes, funcionarios, formas pgto, etc. |
| Gerencial | 14 | Financeiro, contabilidade, BI, DRE |
| Seguranca | 2 | RBAC, acesso unidade |
| Conta | 7 | Perfil, preferencias, seguranca, aulas |

### Area do Cliente

| Pagina | Rota |
|--------|------|
| Check-in | `/check-in` |
| Meus Treinos | `/meus-treinos` |
| Minhas Aulas | `/minhas-aulas` |
| Meus Pagamentos | `/meus-pagamentos` |
| Minhas Avaliacoes | `/minhas-avaliacoes` |
| Meu Perfil | `/meu-perfil` (editar, senha, notificacoes) |

| `src/lib/shared/` | Utilities, types, constants compartilhados |
| `src/lib/forms/` | Schemas zod para formularios |
| `src/lib/tenant/` | Contexto tenant, RBAC, auth, CRM |
| `src/lib/query/` | React Query hooks/client |
| `src/lib/public/` | Services para paginas publicas |
| `src/lib/export/` | Exportacao de tabelas (PDF/CSV) |
| `src/lib/domain/` | Helpers de dominio (status) |
| `src/lib/api/` | HTTP clients para backend |
| `src/hooks/` | Hooks globais reutilizaveis |

| Diretorio | Proposito |
|-----------|-----------|

| `src/components/layout/` | Shell, sidebar, command palette, theme sync |
| `src/components/treinos/` | Editor de treinos (TipTap-based) |
| `src/components/security/` | Badges e feedback de seguranca |
| `src/components/public/` | Shell para jornada publica |
| `src/components/storefront/` | Theme provider + hero da storefront |
| `src/components/pwa/` | Service worker + install prompt |
| `src/components/grade/` | Grade semanal (mural) |
| `src/components/monitor/` | Monitor de catraca/boas-vindas |

## Configuration & Infra

| Aspecto | Detalhe |
|---------|---------|
| Proxy Backend | Next.js rewrites (`/backend/*` -> backend API) |
| Backend URL | `http://localhost:8080` (dev) |
| Security Headers | CSP, HSTS, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy |
| CDN | Cloud CDN (GCS) via `assetPrefix` |
| Bundle Analysis | @next/bundle-analyzer |
| Dead Code | knip |
| Linting | ESLint + eslint-plugin-boundaries |
| PWA | Service worker + manifest |
| Lighthouse CI | @lhci/cli configured |

---

## Patterns Identified

### Architecture Patterns
- **Multi-tenant SaaS**: Backoffice (admin rede) + Portal (tenant) + Cliente (aluno)
- **Backend Proxy**: Next.js rewrites para backend Java/Spring em `:8080`
- **Colocation**: Hooks e components co-localizados por feature/page
- **Route Groups**: Separacao clara por audiencia (`portal`, `backoffice`, `cliente`, `public`)

### Code Patterns
- **react-hook-form + zod**: Padrao obrigatorio para formularios
- **@tanstack/react-query**: Data fetching e cache
- **Absolute imports**: `@/` para `src/`
- **Path aliases**: Configurado em `tsconfig.json`
- **Feature flags**: `src/lib/feature-flags.ts`
- **Access control**: RBAC client-side em `src/lib/access-control.ts`

### Security Patterns
- **CSP headers**: Configurados em `next.config.ts`
- **Sentry**: Error tracking integrado
- **RBAC**: Role-based access control
- **Sanitization**: DOMPurify para HTML
